description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a tan and black color scheme. The body is constructed with a lightweight, angular frame, likely made from polymer and metal, and includes a skeletonized stock for reduced weight and improved ergonomics. The barrel is long and cylindrical, fitted with a prominent suppressor at the muzzle, and a vertical foregrip is attached beneath the handguard for enhanced control. The upper receiver has a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, but no sighting system is currently installed. The magazine is not visible, suggesting it may be internal or not attached. The overall appearance is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern tan and black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, suppressor, and vertical foregrip, lacking visible sights or magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, skeletonized stock, suppressor, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor's circular end and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's angular frame, stock, suppressor, and foregrip from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the barrel and suppressor.
